article.headline: Sykes matches career high with 38 points, expansion Tempo outlast Sun 106-102 in OT
article.description: — Brittney Sykes matched her career high with 38 points and the expansion Toronto Tempo rallied to beat the Connecticut Sun 106-102 in overtime Wednesday night in Commissioner’s Cup play.
article.linkText: Sykes matches career high with 38 points, expansion Tempo outlast Sun 106-102 in OT

images.name: Brittney Sykes puts up 38 points to steer Toronto to narrow OT win
images.caption: Brittney Sykes puts up 38 points to steer Toronto to narrow OT win

video.headline: Brittney Sykes puts up 38 points to steer Toronto to narrow OT win
video.shortHeadline: Brittney Sykes puts up 38 points to steer Toronto to narrow OT win
video.caption: Brittney Sykes puts up 38 points to steer Toronto to narrow OT win
video.title: Brittney Sykes puts up 38 points to steer Toronto to narrow OT win
video.description: Brittney Sykes puts up 38 points to steer Toronto to narrow OT win
video.shortDescription: Brittney Sykes puts up 38 points to steer Toronto to narrow OT win

tracking.trackingName: WNBA_One-Play (Brittney Sykes puts up 38 points to steer Toronto to narrow OT win) 2026/06/10 ESHEET

article.story: TORONTO -- — Brittney Sykes matched her career high with 38 points and the expansion Toronto Tempo rallied to beat the Connecticut Sun 106-102 in overtime Wednesday night in Commissioner’s Cup play. The Tempo (7-5) won for the fourth time in five games. They trailed by 14 points in the second quarter. Sykes was 13 of 13 on free throws, making four in the final 1:19 of regulation. Marina Mabrey added 21 points, and Laura Juskaite had 19. Aaliyah Edwards — from Kingston, Ontario — had a career-high 24 points for the Sun (2-12). She was 8 of 9 from the field. Leila Lacau also had 24 points for Connecticut. Up next Sun: Host Indiana on Saturday. Tempo: At Washington on Friday night. ------ WNBA: https://apnews.com/hub/wnba-basketball

statistics.name: points
statistics.description: The number of points scored.

statistics.name: fieldGoals
statistics.description: Field Goal makes and attempts.

statistics.name: freeThrows
statistics.description: Free Throw makes and attempts.

statistics.name: assists
statistics.description: The number of times a player who passes the ball to a teammate in a way that leads to a score by field goal, meaning that he or she was "assisting" in the basket. There is some judgment involved in deciding whether a passer should be credited with an assist.

statistics.name: turnovers
statistics.description: The number of times a player loses possession to the other team.

statistics.name: minutes
statistics.description: The total number of minutes played.

statistics.name: assistTurnoverRatio
statistics.description: The average number of assists a player or team records per turnover

statistics.name: rebounds
statistics.description: The total number of rebounds (offensive and defensive).

statistics.name: defensiveRebounds
statistics.description: The number of times when the defense obtains the possession of the ball after a missed shot by the offense.
